summary: Completed comprehensive testing of military strategy simulator. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend core features working with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Route completion via double-click not working consistently - tool remains active after route creation
Some sidebar buttons have overlay interception issues preventing clicks

passed_tests: Backend map-state endpoint returns correct arrays
Pin creation (HQ, Ally, Enemy) via API and UI
Coordinates display updates on mouse move
Map displays Rio de Janeiro area correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix route completion double-click functionality and resolve sidebar overlay issues preventing some button clicks. The core functionality is working but user interaction needs refinement.
